---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Resazurin Assays - USDA M.gigas Families in Response to Temperature Stress
date: '2026-04-15'
draft: false
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
---
# INTRO

Quick notebook post to review the resazurin assay data from the USDA M.gigas families in response to temperature stress. This is a work in progress, but I wanted to share some preliminary findings and visualizations. Notebook will be updated later with more details on the methods and results.


# RESULTS

## Plots

### Normalized Fluorescence Over Time - Line Plots

![Mean normalized fluorescence by family over time.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_by_family-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 1.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-1-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 2.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-2-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 3.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-3-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 5.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-5-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 6.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-6-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 7.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-7-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 8.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-8-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 9.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-9-normalized.png)

![Mean normalized fluorescence over time for Family 10.](plot-line_plots-mean_fluorescence_fam-10-normalized.png)


### Normalized Fluorescence Over Time - Box Plots

![Normalized fluorescence by family.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_by_family-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 1.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-1-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 2.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-2-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 3.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-3-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 5.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-5-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 6.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-6-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 7.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-7-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 8.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-8-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 9.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-9-normalized.png)

![Normalized fluorescence for Family 10.](plot-box_plots-fluorescence_fam-10-normalized.png)


### Delta Fluorescence (Raw) Over Time

![Delta mean fluorescence by family over time (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_mean_fluorescence_by_family-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 1 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-1-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 2 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-2-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 3 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-3-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 5 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-5-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 6 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-6-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 7 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-7-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 8 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-8-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 9 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-9-raw.png)

![Delta fluorescence over time for Family 10 (raw).](plot-line_plots-delta_fluorescence_fam-10-raw.png)
